BETRAYAL_BOAT_MISSILE_FAIL: You were killed by a missile.
BETRAYAL_WARN_LEAVE_MISSION_AREA: You are leaving the mission area.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_AT11_DONTMOVE: ^2Atlas Guard 1: ^7Don't move! Get on the ground!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_AT11_IVESPOTTEDTHE: ^2Atlas Guard 1: ^7I've spotted them – there they are!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_AT11_PROPHETTHEFIR: ^2Atlas Guard 1: ^7Prophet, the firedoors in the basement are down!  We can't intercept the fugitives!  We need these doors up now, Dammit!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_AT11_THERETHEYAREM: ^2Atlas Guard 1: ^7There they are! Move in! Move in!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_AT2_ATLASONEWEVEGO: ^2Atlas Guard 2: ^7Atlas-one, we've got the runners cornered in Old Town!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_CRK_YOUREMEMBERYOU: ^2Cormack: ^7You remember your old sergeant, don't you? Let's get you out of here.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_CV1_WHOARETHEY: ^2Civilian 1: ^7Who are they? What are they doing here?
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_CVL1_THEREWEREMENW: ^2Civilian 2 Betrayal: ^7There were men with guns in our home!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_ALRIGHTWEREMOV: ^2Gideon: ^7Alright, we're moving. Let's find out what the hell she wants.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_ECHOTEAMTOOKDO: ^2Gideon: ^7Echo team took down another KVA cell yesterday. The whole network's unraveling. Hades was the key.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_HARDTOBELIEVET: ^2Gideon: ^7Hard to believe this is Baghdad. Two years ago, you couldn't step outside without getting shot. Now it's fuckin thriving, thanks to us.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_HOWDOESITFEELT: ^2Gideon: ^7How does it feel to be the hero of the world? Don't let it go to your--
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_HOWDOYOUKNOWIT: ^2Gideon: ^7How do you know it's not fake?
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_IFYOUREWRONGAB: ^2Gideon: ^7If you're wrong about Irons, I'll hunt you down myself.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_LETSSEEWHATTHE: ^2Gideon: ^7Let's see what the hell she wants.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_ROOFISCLEAR: ^2Gideon: ^7Roof is clear. No sign of them.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_THEGUYWEPULLED: ^2Gideon: ^7The guy we pulled out of the river?
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_GDN_THEWORLDSRUNNI: ^2Gideon: ^7The world, my friend, is running out of bad guys. You might be looking at an early retirement.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_COPY: ^2Ilona: ^7Copy. The boat's finished, we're on foot.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_DIDYOUTELLANY: ^2Ilona: ^7Did you tell anyone you were coming?
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_GIDEONMITCHEL: ^2Ilona: ^7Gideon, Mitchell. I need to see you. Right now.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_HADES: ^2Ilona: ^7Hades. His last act before he died.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_HADES2: ^2Ilona: ^7Hades. His last act before he died was giving us this.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_HEKNEWIT: ^2Ilona: ^7He knew it. He knew and he let it happen. All those people dead, and he fucking profited from it!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_HENEVERMADEIT: ^2Ilona: ^7He never made it back to Nigeria.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_HOWAREWESUPPO: ^2Ilona: ^7How are we supposed to get up there?
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_ITWASCODEDAND: ^2Ilona: ^7It was coded and encrypted in our own algorithm! It's from Atlas. No one has seen this but us. We need to get out of here! Now!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_MEETMEINMAINT: ^2Ilona: ^7Meet me in maintenance room 6A. Don't bring anyone else.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_MITCHELLWECAN: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, we can climb up over here.
^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, we can grapple up over here.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_REMEMBERLAGOS: ^2Ilona: ^7Remember Lagos? That's Irons with the technologist you saved.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_THATSIRONSWIT: ^2Ilona: ^7That's Irons with the technologist you saved.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_THESCRAMBLERW: ^2Ilona: ^7The scrambler will only buy us a few minutes. Sync to my HUD. I have to show you something.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_THEYREGOINGFO: ^2Ilona: ^7They're going for the guards. Now what?
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_THEYREGOINGTO: ^2Ilona: ^7They're going to lock down the entire city to find us.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_WELLHAVETOUSE: ^2Ilona: ^7We'll have to use our mag grips.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_WENEEDTOGETOU: ^2Ilona: ^7We need to get out of here, Now!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_WEVEGOTTOGETA: ^2Ilona: ^7We've got to get away from this swarm!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_ILN1_YOUKNEWABOUTT: ^2Ilona: ^7You knew about the attacks. All those innocent people--dead!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_IRS_IMDISSAPOINTED: ^2Irons: ^7I'm disappointed in you. You could've had everything. Hold them here until the reporters leave. Gideon?
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_IRS_NO: ^2Irons: ^7No! We have to tell everyone! It's okay. It's alright. I'm gonna take care of this right now.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_IRS_OKITSALRIGHT: ^2Irons: ^7Ok. It's alright. Everything's going to be alright.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_IRS_YOUSAWAFORGEDR: ^2Irons: ^7You saw a forged recording taken from a terrorist.
^2Irons: ^7You saw a forged recording from a terrorist.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_IRS_YOUVEDISAPPOIN: ^2Irons: ^7You've disappointed me. You could have had everything. Hold them here until the reporters leave. Gideon?
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_PA2_ATTENTIONTHISI: ^2PA 2: ^7Attention, this is a security alert. All citizens, return to your homes immediately. I repeat, return to your homes and wait for further instructions. Thank you.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_PA_ALLSECURITYPERS: ^2PA: ^7All security personnel, report to the third floor immediately.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_PA_ATTENTION: ^2PA: ^7Attention. All security units, we have a breach on level 5. Report immediately to your stations.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_PA_ATTENTIONCITIZE: ^2PA: ^7Attention citizens – Return to your homes.  Atlas forces are working to apprehend the fugitives.  Stay calm, and remain in your homes until further notice.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_PA_DONOTATTEMPTTOL: ^2PA: ^7Do not attempt to leave the city.  Stay in your homes and lock your doors.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_PA_FUGITIVESARELOO: ^2PA: ^7Fugitives are loose in oldtown.  Atlas forces inbound.  Return to your homes.  Lock your doors.  Do not attempt to aid the fugitives.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_PA_SECURITYLOCKDOW: ^2PA: ^7Security lock down in effect. Repeat, security lock down in effect.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_PRT_COPYTHAT: ^2Prophet: ^7Copy that.  Overriding the firedoor systems now.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_TCT_NUCLEARPOWERPL: ^2Technologist: ^7Nuclear power plants, all over the world.They wanted me to compromise the security systems.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_TCT_POWERPLANTSALL: ^2Technologist: ^7Power plants, all over the world.They wanted me to compromise the security systems.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_TCT_SEATTLEPARISTO: ^2Technologist: ^7Seattle, Paris, Tokyo...thousands will die! We have to tell someone. We have to tell everyone!
^2Technologist: ^7Seattle, Paris, Tokyo...thousands will die! We have to tell someone.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_TCT_THEKVAAREPLANN: ^2Technologist: ^7The KVA are planning an attack...they told me everything.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_EXTRACTIONPOINTI: ^2X: ^7Extraction point is right above you--top of the building.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_GETTOTHATCRANEAN: ^2X: ^7Get to that crane and go across it.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_HEADDOWNTHECANAL: ^2X: ^7Head down the canal towards the commerical center.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_ILEFTYOUATOOL: ^2X: ^7There's a boat waiting for you at the end of the docks.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_IMOVERRIDINGTHEG: ^2X: ^7I'm overriding the gates. Get across the roof and jump the rail at the opening.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_KEEPGOINGYOURERU: ^2X: ^7Keep going, you're running out of time.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_LISTEN: ^2X: ^7Listen. We've hacked into your exo system. I need you to trust me. In three seconds, the fire suppression system will be activated. Get ready to run.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_MITCHELLILONACAN: ^2X: ^7Mitchell, Ilona, can you hear me?!  You've got to keep moving.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_PUTONTHATGRAPPLE: ^2X: ^7Put on that grapple attachment. You'll need it later.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_SEWERACCESSISDIR: ^2X: ^7Sewer access is directly ahead of you. Move.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_STARTCLIMBINGAND: ^2X: ^7Start climbing and get to the roof.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_THATSWHYYOUNEEDT: ^2X: ^7That's why you need to move fast.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_THEBOATSONTHESEC: ^2X: ^7The boat's on the second dock, up ahead.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_THEYREGOINGTOACT: ^2X: ^7They're going to activate a drone swarm. You'll only have a few seconds once you're on the roof.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_THEYREROUNDINGUP: ^2X: ^7They're rounding up civilians. We don't have much time.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_USEYOURMAGGRIPSO: ^2X: ^7Use your mag grips on that crane, now!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_YOULLNEEDTOGETTH: ^2X: ^7You'll need to get through Old Town. Head towards the docks.
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_YOUREALMOSTTHERE: ^2X: ^7You're almost there, just grapple up that tower now!
SUBTITLE_BETRAYAL_BET_X_YOUVEBEENDISCOVE: ^2X: ^7You've been discovered, Atlas forces are moving in.
